reason: Acceptance criteria AC1-AC8 are the verification target. Definition of Done lists test layers.
Cross-layer data flow (dataset → matching → runner → report → CI). Failure handling expectations and observability fields to verify.
Per-step validation commands and review gates list — each step's gate is a check item.
pytest scope and test layering — checks must verify new eval changes follow them. Deterministic baseline output is a forbidden-pattern guard.
Verify new errors (missing baseline, malformed negatives) follow ServiceError code conventions.
Verify report output and CI logs do not leak high-cardinality data (raw queries, full source lists in metrics labels).
Verify the negatives field is wired consistently through every layer it crosses.
Verify match_negatives reuses _matches helpers instead of duplicating relevance logic.
